cards.title: Automated Reasoning
cards.governance_note: State what has been formalized before interpreting machine inference.

cards.title: Mechanical Inference
cards.governance_note: Expose premises, rules, conclusions, traces, and assumptions.

cards.title: Proof and Model Evidence
cards.governance_note: Preserve proof objects, satisfying assignments, counterexample traces, and model assumptions.

cards.title: Inference Governance
cards.governance_note: Distinguish checked, proved, generated, inferred, unknown, and out-of-scope claims.
